patterns_applied.name: Terminology Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different field labels per coverage section (e.g., Reserve vs Outstanding)

patterns_applied.name: Currency Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different currency formats per section ($1,234 vs 1234.56 vs em-dash for zero)

patterns_applied.name: Date Format Inconsistency
patterns_applied.description: Different date formats per section (MM/DD/YYYY vs YYYY-MM-DD vs Mon DD, YYYY)

patterns_applied.name: Column Synonym Chaos
patterns_applied.description: Replaced 8 column names with mild_jargon carrier jargon

patterns_applied.name: Borderless Table
patterns_applied.description: Removed all table gridlines, whitespace-only alignment

patterns_applied.name: Multi-Page Continuation
patterns_applied.description: Table splits across pages with different headers on continuation page

patterns_applied.name: Multi-Line Wrap
patterns_applied.description: Long narrative descriptions wrapping 3-5 lines without row separators

patterns_applied.name: Alternating Shading
patterns_applied.description: Alternating row background colors for readability

patterns_applied.name: Untagged Headers/Footers
patterns_applied.description: Header/footer text drawn directly on canvas without structure tags
